tools.name: webfetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL and return its markdownified body. Caches results to disk under <workdir>/.cache/stado-webfetch/<sha256-of-url>.json so repeated fetches of the same URL inside or across sessions are free. Drop-in replacement for the bundled webfetch tool — wire it via `[tools].overrides = { webfetch = "webfetch-cached-0.1.0" }` in config.toml.
